tooltip.ultimate_apple_mod.ender_pearl_a: §7up to 256 blocks with the power of Endermen.
tooltip.ultimate_apple_mod.tnt_apple.lin: §6Throw to create a vanilla TNT explosion.
§6Teleports you back to where you were 5 seconds ago.
§7Position is tracked every second. Handle with care.
§6Curses nearby mobs with Wither II and grants Lifesteal.
§7Each kill heals 1 heart. Effect lasts 1 minute.
§7Eat to load charges. Won't fire while attacking with a weapon.
message.ultimate_apple_mod.rewind_no_his: §7No history yet... try again in a few seconds.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.root.des: Discover the world of magical apples.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.rotten_a: Eat a Rotten Apple. Good luck.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.burnt_ap: Eat a Burnt Apple — tastes like regret.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.dirt_app: Eat a Dirt Apple. Why would you do this.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.copper_a: Eat a Copper Apple — Haste, Strength, and Resistance await.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.lapislaz: Eat a Lapis Lazuli Apple and gain 5 levels of experience.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.moon_app: Eat a Moon Apple and leap to the skies.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.honey_ap: Eat a Honey Apple and cleanse your effects.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.wither_a: Eat a Wither Apple and gain Lifesteal.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.echo_app: Eat an Echo Apple and mark your return.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.orchard_: Eat an Orchard Apple and summon a forest.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.void_app: Eat a Void Apple and launch into the sky.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.time_fre: Eat a Time Freeze Apple. The world stops, you don't.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.netherit: Eat a Netherite Apple. You are unstoppable.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.dragon_a: Eat a Dragon Apple and channel the Ender Dragon.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.nether_s: Eat a Nether Star Apple. 2 seconds of true invincibility.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.totem_ap: Eat a Totem Apple and cheat death itself.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.quantum_: Eat a Quantum Apple. You had no idea what would happen.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.prism_ap: Eat a Prism Apple and conquer the ocean.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.mix_firs: Mix two apples in the Mixer to brew your first Shake.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.drink_fi: Drink a Shake and taste the combined power of two apples.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.eat_all_: Eat every apple in the mod. A true apple lover.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.tnt_appl: Kill a Ghast with a TNT Apple. Fight fire with fire.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.ender_pe: Teleport with an Ender Pearl Apple and accidentally summon an Endermite. A 5 % chance you didn't want.
advancements.ultimate_apple_mod.coal_app: 석탄 사과를 먹으세요. 후회의 맛이 납니다.
item.ultimate_apple_mod.waxed_exposed_co: 밀랍 처리된 약간 산화된 구리 사과
Honeycomb euro wakseuhaeseo sanhwa reul meomchwo.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.totem_apple.info1: Grants §6Totem Protection§r - survives one fatal blow with brief invincibility.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.wither_apple.info: Also provides Absorption III, Resistance II and Regeneration II.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.void_apple.info: §8Teleports§r the player to a random location in the world.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.nether_star_apple: §fCrafted from a Nether Star§r - immensely powerful. Stack size: 1.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.time_freeze_apple: Frozen mobs cannot move or attack until the effect expires.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.prism_apple.info: §3Prismarine-infused§r apple granting a unique aquatic buff.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.blaze_apple.info: §6Rare drop from Blazes§r in the Nether (approx. 3% chance).
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.copper_apple.info: Each apple in a stack oxidises independently - one at a time.
§eWax with a Honeycomb§r to freeze the current stage permanently.
Oxidises slowly over ~15-20 minutes in the player's inventory.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.quantum_apple.inf: Includes Totem Protection, Lifesteal, Moon Gravity, Time Freeze, Curse of Rotten and more.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.moon_apple.info2: Jump ~3x higher and descend slowly. Source: §bMoon Apple§r.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.wither_apple.info: Grants §cLifesteal§r - a portion of melee damage dealt is returned as health.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.moon_apple.info1: Grants §bMoon Gravity§r - reduces gravity to ~1/6th of normal for 30 s.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.rotten_apple.info: Only obtainable as a rare drop from §4Baby Zombies§r. Cannot be crafted.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.echo_apple.info: §7Echoes§r a nearby sound and grants special sculk-related properties.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.rotten_apple.info: Grants §4Curse of Rotten§r - shrinks hitbox and causes uncontrollable movement.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.quantum_apple.inf: Crafted in the §dMixer§r - the ultimate apple.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.rewind_apple.info: §aReverts§r the player's position and health to a few seconds in the past.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.time_freeze_apple: Grants §3Time Freeze§r - all nearby mobs are frozen in place for 30 s.
jei.ultimate_apple_mod.quantum_apple.inf: Grants §5ALL effects§r from every apple in this mod simultaneously.
tooltip.ultimate_apple_mod.nuclear_apple: §7Throw it. Watch it land. Watch everything disappear.
effect.ultimate_apple_mod.lifesteal.desc: A portion of all melee damage dealt is returned to you as health. Higher amplifier levels increase the stolen fraction.
effect.ultimate_apple_mod.totem_protecti: When a fatal blow is received, this effect absorbs it and grants a brief window of invincibility, keeping you alive with a small amount of health.
effect.ultimate_apple_mod.moon_gravity.d: Reduces gravitational pull to about one-sixth of normal, letting you jump roughly three times higher and float slowly back down.
effect.ultimate_apple_mod.time_freeze.de: Freezes all nearby mobs in place. Frozen mobs cannot move, attack, or deal damage until the effect expires.
effect.ultimate_apple_mod.curse_of_rotte: A curse from rotten apples. Shrinks your hitbox, raises movement speed unnaturally, and makes you uncontrollable for its duration.
